message: Jake
Tonny
Jennifer
Fabar
Kristy
Hah
Eek!
How are you?
You seem pretty high, huh? Aren't you dabbling in some bad drugs?
How rude.
Is it strange that I'm feeling cheerful? Well, whatever.
You're happy that Guy is back, huh?
Hehe.
Of course!

Even though it’s supposedly a very private party at the director's home, everyone is dressed up.
Even though it's a personal invitation from the director, there aren't too many people. Is it because many are busy, or...?
Meryl's bizarre behavior nearly silenced everyone, but now there's a sense of liveliness returning.
Most people seem somewhat uncomfortable.
Since Gai returned, he seems really happy. His health is also recovering to what it was before.
He seems like a completely different person from when he was having counseling with Günter.
I wonder if it suddenly became terrifying; his body is shaking. Does that mean he was desperate?
Even though he didn’t seem scared of sharp objects, now he’s making a stiff face.
When you smile so much, it’s actually kind of creepy.
That’s awful.
I don't think that's a fair way to say it.
I mean, I've only seen sad faces until now.
Yeah, that was true. I really caused you a lot of trouble. I’m really sorry.
I’ve been nothing but a bother to you, haven’t I?
Ah, my heart is still racing.
I guess I was really scared.
You were bravely protecting Gai in the moment, weren't you?
Really? Is that true?
No way, I don’t remember what I did. But it felt like a dream because it was such a fleeting moment.
It’s strange, I didn’t think of knives as scary.
I was even told it strangely brightened up.
Well, it can’t be helped because it’s true.
Because...
I’m happy, you see, because Gai is here.
I don’t really like it much, but now it doesn’t matter.
He looked at us all with such a cold gaze, including Meryl.
Wasn’t he originally someone who had that kind of look?
Even if that’s true, it was truly a chilling gaze.
I wonder if he hates Meryl.
To look at her with those eyes.
I greeted the director, but they seem a bit tired.
Yeah, I'm a little worried.
Really, I hadn't noticed because I've been so focused on myself, but they're having a tough time.
Even when they're busy with their own issues, they went out of their way to hold a party for Gai, and I'm grateful for that.
I wonder if the director is okay?
Huh?
Meryl's like that.
If the director's lover is doing something like that,
it must be really hard for them.
The director has certainly had a string of bad luck.
You know, I fell for Gai all over again. After seeing his face for the first time in a while, I realized how much I still liked him.
Alright, alright, thanks for the meal.
Oh come on,
really?
is wonderful too.
Just after Gai.
Hey, why did Gai have to go through that?
Really, why do you think?
She was calling out Ariana, but what if Gai has another woman?
What should we do?
That's just a concern, you shouldn't think about other women.
I hear you, but,
I can't help but be curious.
I trust Gai, but,
my anxiety doesn't go away.
is really clingy to the director now. They didn't act like that last time.
Is there something going on between them?
I can't say for sure,
but it feels suspicious.
With the director,
I wonder if that's the kind of relationship they have.
It seems even more serious with the director now. Could it be that Meryl and the director broke up?
What’s wrong? You’ve never been interested in things like that before.
Oh, now that you mention it, when did I become like this?
It’s embarrassing.
It’s not very pleasant to watch.
If he takes the lead, what will Meryl do?
Why? Why did you do something like that?
I didn’t do anything.
That’s right, you didn’t do anything. It's Meryl, Meryl! Of all people, why Guy?
I want to know why Guy has to be stabbed.
Hey,
there’s nothing going on between Guy and Meryl, right?
I don’t think there was anything like that at all.
That’s right, it’s not a lovers' quarrel, is it? Could it be because he’s suspected of being a murderer?
Why suspect Guy? Is it because of that article?
That kind of talk isn’t something you should have in a place like this. It’s disrespectful to the director.
Is that so?
Of course. Did you forget Guy was accused of being the criminal? He would be sad to hear such things.
It’s thoughtless. This isn’t a conversation for here!
It’s something I don’t want to think about, but could it be that Guy is suspected of being the culprit against Meryl?
I think that’s quite likely. I mean, there doesn’t seem to be any other reason, right?
That’s true. But he’s not a criminal. I know that.
Guy is not a criminal.
This is,
what was it again?
No. But that’s quite an oddly shaped key. I wonder what kind of taste they have?
If you’re talking about the owner of such a key,
it feels like it should be around here.
